display.purpose: Hero title only. One instance per page. Architectural scale.

headline.purpose: One per section. Reads as a room element, not a text label.

title.purpose: Card headings, nav labels. Always uppercase, tracked wide.

body.purpose: Section descriptions and card copy. Light weight only, 65-75ch max.

label.purpose: Prices, metadata, section identifiers. Monospace precision.

motion.name: scroll-progress
motion.purpose: Progress bar scaleX. Motion spring via useSpring.

motion.name: section-reveal
motion.purpose: whileInView on each brand section. Once: true.

motion.name: card-reveal
motion.purpose: DetailCard entrance. Staggered by grid position.

motion.name: hover-transition
motion.purpose: Border color shifts, image scale on DetailCard hover.

motion.name: button-wipe
motion.purpose: Primary button hover: white layer slides in from bottom.

breakpoints.name: lg
breakpoints.purpose: Sidebar becomes visible; below this, zero navigation exists (P1 audit gap).

breakpoints.name: md
breakpoints.purpose: Grid switches from 1 to 2 columns; display type scales down.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Block stamp CTA. Hard edges, crimson flood, uppercase label. White wipe on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { position: relative; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #E8003D; color: #FFFFFF; padding: 16px 32px; border: none; border-radius: 0; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; overflow: hidden; transition: color 300ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { color: #050505; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #E8003D; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary__label { position: relative; z-index: 1; } .ds-btn-primary__wipe { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: #FFFFFF; transform: translateY(100%); transition: transform 300ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover .ds-btn-primary__wipe { transform: translateY(0); }

components.name: Nav Item (Default)
components.description: Sidebar navigation item at rest. Ash text, transparent left border, uppercase tracking.
components.css: .ds-nav-item { width: 100%; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; padding: 16px; background: transparent; border: none; border-left: 4px solid transparent; color: #888888; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: color 300ms, background 300ms, border-color 300ms; } .ds-nav-item:hover { color: #cccccc; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.02); } .ds-nav-item:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #E8003D; outline-offset: -2px; } .ds-nav-item__icon { width: 24px; height: 24px; flex-shrink: 0; color: #52525b; transition: color 300ms; } .ds-nav-item:hover .ds-nav-item__icon { color: #888888; } .ds-nav-item__label { font-size: 0.875rem; }

components.name: Nav Item (Active)
components.description: Sidebar navigation item in active/current state. Crimson left border, white text.
components.css: .ds-nav-item--active { border-left-color: #DC2626; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); color: #FFFFFF; } .ds-nav-item--active .ds-nav-item__icon { color: #DC2626; } .ds-nav-item__chevron { width: 16px; height: 16px; color: #DC2626; margin-left: auto; }

components.name: Detail Card
components.description: Polymorphic content card. Media (image/swatch/map) above text block. Crimson border glow on hover.
components.html:
CARD TITLE

Card body text describing the brand element in detail.
components.css: .ds-detail-card { position: relative; background: rgba(24,24,27,0.5); border: 1px solid #2E2E2E; border-radius: 8px; padding: 24px; overflow: hidden; transition: border-color 300ms; } .ds-detail-card:hover { border-color: rgba(232,0,61,0.5); } .ds-detail-card__media { aspect-ratio: 1; border-radius: 6px; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid #2E2E2E; background: #050505; margin-bottom: 24px; } .ds-detail-card__img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; transition: transform 500ms ease-out; } .ds-detail-card:hover .ds-detail-card__img { transform: scale(1.1); } .ds-detail-card__lightning { position: absolute; top: 8px; right: 8px; opacity: 0.1; transition: opacity 300ms; } .ds-detail-card:hover .ds-detail-card__lightning { opacity: 1; } .ds-detail-card__title { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 700; color: #EF4444; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: -0.02em; margin: 0 0 8px; } .ds-detail-card__body { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 300; color: #A1A1AA; line-height: 1.6; margin: 0; }

components.name: Progress Bar
components.description: Scroll progress indicator. Fixed top, full width, 4px height, scaleX transform only.
components.css: .ds-progress-bar { position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 4px; background: #E8003D; transform-origin: left; transform: scaleX(0.45); z-index: 100; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Back to Top
components.description: Circular crimson button, fixed bottom-right. ArrowUp icon shifts on hover.
components.html: <button class="ds-back-to-top" aria-label="Back to top"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M12 19V5M5 12l7-7 7 7"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-back-to-top { position: fixed; bottom: 32px; right: 32px; width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #E8003D; color: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(232,0,61,0.2); transition: transform 300ms ease-out; z-index: 60; } .ds-back-to-top:hover { transform: scale(1.1); } .ds-back-to-top:hover svg { transform: translateY(-4px); } .ds-back-to-top:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #E8003D; outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-back-to-top svg { transition: transform 300ms ease-out; }

narrative.overview:
Mojo's brand guidelines are a blackboard chalked in crimson on charcoal. Not a PDF, not a slide deck: a surface where everything is permanent, visible, and non-negotiable. The design system doesn't persuade; it states. The typography is enormous because the brand is enormous. The darkness is total because the brand lives at night, under neon, behind the pass.

This is a brand register surface where the design IS the product. An internal operator consulting it should feel the same brand energy they feel standing inside a Mojo's location. An external supplier should understand immediately that ambiguity is not an option here. The scrolling experience is a walk through the brand, section by section, each one self-contained and authoritative.

What this system explicitly rejects: the friendly brightness of corporate fast food, the beige safety of food delivery app UI, the precious restraint of fine dining, and the hand-lettered earnestness of craft beer branding. This is none of those. It is a rock venue that happens to serve the best burger you've ever eaten.
keyCharacteristics: Total darkness. #050505 is the floor; everything else is layered above it.
One voice in crimson. #E8003D punctuates, it does not flood.
Typography at extreme scale. Section headings are architectural elements, not labels.
Flat depth. No shadows. Tonal layering creates dimension.
Committed motion. Scroll-driven reveals, not scattered micro-interactions.

rules.name: The One Ember Rule
rules.body: Live Ember appears on no more than 15% of any given screen. Its job is to punctuate, not saturate. A page where crimson becomes the background has crossed into Stage Light territory (hero panels only).

rules.name: The No-Lightening Rule
rules.body: Never introduce a lighter background to soften or air out a section. The darkness is structural. If a section feels heavy, reduce content density; do not brighten the surface.

rules.name: The Anton-Only Headlines Rule
rules.body: No other font family appears at headline scale. Substituting Space Grotesk or Inter at large sizes reads as a design mistake, not a variant. Anton owns everything above 2rem.

rules.name: The Counterweight Rule
rules.body: Display/Headline weight is locked at the heaviest end. Body weight is locked at the lightest end. The contrast between 400-weight Anton and 300-weight Inter is the entire typographic argument. Introducing medium-weight body copy collapses it.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: No box-shadow on any surface, ever. If a component feels unanchored, the answer is a tonal background step, not a shadow. A shadow here would look like a mistake from a different design system.

dos: Do keep every background dark. If a section reads as light mode, it is wrong.
Do let Anton breathe at extreme scale. Headline text below 64px is not a headline.
Do use Live Ember for exactly one interactive role per screen region at a time.
Do reference the existing food photography style (overhead, matte black plates, dark stone surface) for any new image additions.
Do write button labels, nav items, and card headings in uppercase.
Do use Backstage Cream (#F0EDE8) for text on any crimson panel.
Do verify contrast ratios when adding secondary/label text. Cold Ash (#888888) is the floor.
donts: Don't introduce light backgrounds. Not #F5F5F5, not #FAFAFA, not any tinted cream.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text). Use a single solid color.
Don't use box-shadow on any surface. The flat-by-default rule is absolute.
Don't make it look like corporate fast food (McDonald's, KFC).
Don't make it look like a food delivery app (Uber Eats, Grab).
Don't make it look like hipster craft branding (earth tones, hand-lettered, small batch).
Don't make it look like fine dining (minimal, white, precious, hushed).
Don't add a sidebar border stripe (border-left > 1px) to cards or content blocks as decoration.
Don't use glassmorphism except on the fixed header where it is structural.
Don't repeat the SECTION_* label pattern without verifying it carries real information.
Don't shrink the headline type. If it feels too big, that is the correct size.
